message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Ginny
Boss
I received a reminder call from someone named Gabriela. You have to go, whether you like it or not.
U
n
Got it.
Welcome back, Boss.
Did something happen?
Your expression looks dark.
It's nothing, I'm just feeling a little low on energy.
Boss!
Good work, Boss.
Welcome back, Boss. Did you find anything useful?
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Call
Move
System
Surroundings
Meryl's request
About　that
About Guy
About Cindy
About Gloria
About Günter
About that
About Meryl's request
's　matter
About Cindy
About Gloria

's matter
To another place
Save
End the game
Looking at it this way, it's lonely to see nothing on the wall in front of me.
For me, this will be my 'castle', but...
What a small 'castle' it is.
A longer life that blooms brightly and then scatters.
What am I even saying?
Pouting with a round face resembling a raccoon, it's quite charming.
It seems like she's upset that I haven't visited Anna's house yet.
Even if you say that, to be honest, I’ve never had a premonition come true.
While staring at the computer screen, she's giggling at times.
What on earth happened?
While she pays attention to me, she looks glued to the computer.
She always seems to be smiling, but I have no idea what she’s thinking inside.
Boss, have you been to Anna Skakki's house?
Hmm, no.
I haven’t been yet.
Boss.
You don't believe my intuition, do you!?
Boss, where do you usually go to hang out?
Boss, about Anna Skakki's house...
Yeah, I finally met her.
Yay!
Now, this marks the end of my first job!
Who said anything about the end?
But even if I met Anna,
could it be that Anna was a case of mistaken identity?
Ah.
This must be a cursed detective office.
No, that's not it! Maybe it's someone's prank!
Don't say impossible things.
But,
ah, could it be that I'm just super unlucky?
Hey,
won't you take the role of going to talk to Meryl?
D-Don't just push that onto someone!
That kind of thing.
Because,
I wonder what kind of face Meryl would make if she heard this?
Ah,
please don't bully me.
I guess we'll just have to cover it with effort and spirit.
Do your best, Boss!
To make Meryl's request successful, I absolutely have to meet Anna.
That's true.
That's right.
It's not like that. If you just want to meet Anna, you could see her right away.
Boss, are you really serious about this?
Reality is quite a challenging situation.
No way.
I don't want to hear such a terrible story.
That unpleasant talk.
is about the request that you like.
But with that expression, there's no way it's about anything good.
So, what was the real situation?
Umm.
I don't want to talk.
I don't want to talk.
Is it really that serious?!
It's not necessarily a bright future.
Meryl, you were in such a hurry, right?
Yeah.
Ah, if I tell Meryl, I might get choked!
That's true, she'd definitely do that.
No way, has a desperate outcome come up?
right?
It's pretty desperate, I gotta say.
It really is.
Ariana is dead!?
She's not dead.
But, I can't entirely dismiss the possibility of her being dead.
Um.
Could you explain a bit more clearly?
A foster parent without relatives got a daughter named Ariana, but both died in an accident when she was still small.
Nobody knows the whereabouts of that daughter.
That's what they said.
What should we do? All the expenses up until now will have been wasted.
Ah.
So we're back to square one?
Did you meet with her?
Yeah, I went to see her. She seemed normal, almost like it's a lie how energetic she was.
So that means the counseling worked. I'm glad I introduced you.
The doctor is a respectable person, so it'll be fine. You can rest assured.
Maybe I should try to meet her once.
Günter is a busy man, so you shouldn't bother him.
But, can someone really recover that easily?
Maybe it just means she wasn't that bad off after all?
Yeah, that might be it.
But is it really that simple?
Boss
Is there something on your mind?
You can just be happy about the recovery, you know.
Have you heard from them?
No. If they had kept going to counseling, wouldn’t they be feeling better?
Yeah, that’s true.
Are you worried about something?
The teacher is a fine person, so you’ll be fine. You don’t need to worry.
Maybe I’ll go and visit once.
To who?
No, I mean that teacher. I want to see what kind of person they are.
Günter is a busy person, so it wouldn’t be good to interrupt.
Boss, please don’t cause any trouble for the teacher.
No contact from Guy.
None.
You don’t have to say it so definitively.
But if there’s nothing, there’s nothing. I think it’s better than giving false hope.
I can understand how you feel, but for Guy, weren’t you just a friend, nothing more?
Wow, that’s harsh.
But, don’t you think if you were best friends, this kind of conversation wouldn’t happen?
Gradually, I’m starting to think Guy is a bit of a jerk.
ＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲ
Oh, phone.
Hello?
Yes? Ah, that’s right.
Huh?　Oh,
C-could you please hold on for a moment?
What’s wrong? Is it a prank call?
Um.
I’m not really sure what it is.
But it’s for Boss, please put me through.
? Hello, the call has been transferred.
The person on the other end of the phone.
You,
・Snipes?
Yes, that's right but
the caller.
Listen, you need to come to the place I'm about to tell you urgently. Okay?
I, uh,
Excuse me, who is this?
the caller.
Ah, sorry about that. I'm Gabriela, and I want to ask for your help finding someone through Director Fabar.
Just wait a moment, Gabriela.
Gabriela.
I'm sorry, but I don't have time. So, you need to come to my office urgently! We'll talk after that.
After Gabriela gave her address in the Upper West, she abruptly hung up the phone.
What was that about?
It seems like the great Director Fabar is handling our sales for us.
Ah, so that's why she called.
Boss, you look troubled?
It seems like it's another missing person.
Finding people takes patience, right? I don’t think I'm suited for that.
This time it’s going to go well for sure!
I hope so.
Ah, I'm feeling heavy about this.
Well, they seem to be in a hurry, so I'm going to head out now. Ignoring this might anger Director Fabar.
Be careful and take care, Boss.
What happened with Cindy?
Who knows?
Who knows?
That’s just too careless.
Isn’t it better to look for Cindy than not look for her?
If I don’t have to look for her, I think it’s better that way. After all, it’s me who ends up struggling.
Boss, that's pathetic, that statement.
Is Cindy still missing?
Um, didn't you ask for a phone number from Gloria before?
Ah, speaking of which, I might have asked.
Could it be that you're waiting for the boss to contact you, just like Meryl?
What should we do?
Boss, if you remember the phone number, I think it’d be better to call.
Uh.
Hmm, what should I do?
What should I do?
Not that! Even if I'm disliked, work is work. I shouldn't be picky.
It’s definitely true that Gloria dislikes the boss.
Günter seemed like a scary person.
Wasn't he in a bad mood?
I did force him to make time for me.
Yeah.
No! You can't do something like that!
No!
What the boss did is like blasphemy against God.
That's a bit exaggerated.
500,000 patients in Manhattan will resent the boss.
Where does that number even come from?
It’s fine! Just go with the flow!
Please don’t bother us again.
Günter is a good person.
Plus, he’s extremely busy.
That might be true, but...
What I want to know isn’t about that.
He’s the most reputed psychiatrist in New York right now.
I actually had a counseling session with him.
Oh, really?
Yeah.
I went through a tough time before.
But now, I'm doing great.
It's okay. She's a trusted teacher.
In New York,
there was an incident involving one of the victims, and I heard Anna's daughter was the victim.
What, really!? Is that so?!
Apparently, Anna had been away from home for a long time.
That's just too sad.
According to Anna, it seems both her wrists were missing.
Both wrists.
What was the culprit thinking?
Seriously, I can't forgive this criminal!
I'm sorry for keeping Meryl waiting.
I've been starting to feel guilty lately,
about that.
I have to tell Meryl the truth,
but searching for Ariana is nearly impossible now.
When should I go talk to Meryl?
When I talked to her, she was surprisingly normal. It's reassuring, but,
on the other hand, I feel like something's off.
If she really recovers, that would be great,
but the fact that she's in the counselor's care is somewhat reassuring.
However, I wonder if that’s good for her.
Considering that, I think Gai returning would be the best medicine, but he's missing.
What about Gai?
Is there no way for us to go back?
I only saw Cindy at the party. I wonder if she’s doing well and still cute.
Maybe she's already come back.
Gloria is a completely baffling woman. I bet she dislikes me.
So why is she asking for help?
That must have been forced by the director.
I feel heavy about contacting her.
Günter might be a great psychiatrist, but he's not the type I can like.
I felt kind of anxious when I faced him, but why was that?
I need to meet Gunter at least once.
What kind of person is a reputable psychiatrist, I wonder?
Continuation
One of the victims was Anna Skakki's daughter.
It seems Anna was away for her daughter's funeral, but it took her a while to return because she probably didn't want to come back to this town.
The world seems wide, yet it's actually small.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
